title: zanthoxylum accedens
intro: Zanthoxylum accedens is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the prickly ash or southern prickly ash. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum accedens include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and its seeds and roots are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
